---
title: "Elizabeth A. Curteis"
---

## Elizabeth A. Curteis

**Dates:** (born Ireland 1840/1)

### Description

writer and possible contributor to <i>MP</i>

### Biography

The wife of the Rev. George Herbert Curteis (1823/4-1894), head of Lichfield Theological College in 1861, Rector of Waldron, Sussex in 1881, chaplain of Royal Savoy Chapel in 1891, she wrote a life of Bishop Selwyn , and children\'s verse. Another possible candidate for this Mrs Curteis is Frances Curteis (1816/7-1887), mother of Bessie Charlotte Curteis, a known contributor.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
